Arrangement of supplied logos and information, including:
  • Proofing of all items in this quote
  • Up to 2 free minor and non-extensive changes
  • Artwork, logos and text to be supplied in print ready high-resolution PDF or EPS format. If specific colours are required, these are to be provided as PMS or Pantone; or additional matching fees will be incurred.
  • Conversion of artwork to print ready format
Logo re-creation or image enhancing may need to be charged additionally depending on the extent.
